attributes.description: Network resource navigation captured in shellbags. Covers (1) explicit UNC paths like \\server\share, (2) IP-addressed paths like \\10.x.x.x\share, (3) legacy My Network Places navigation, and (4) mapped network drives (drive letters W–Z by IT convention). Strong insider-threat signal when paths reference file servers, document repositories, or admin shares the user shouldn't be browsing.
attributes.title: Shellbags: Network Resource Navigation (UNC, IP, Mapped Drives W–Z)
